codeReview.summary: Core SDK methods and tests are implemented, but two feature-contract requirements were missed: dual-module (ESM+CJS) build output and the requested getBalances(address) API shape.

issues.description: Feature description requires build output for both ESM and CJS with type declarations, but package exports only "import" + "types" and build is plain `tsc` (no CJS artifact path such as `require`/`index.cjs`).

Feature contract specifies `getBalances(address)`, but implementation requires `getBalances(address, baseAssetAddress, quoteAssetAddress)`, changing the promised SDK API and forcing callers to pass extra chain metadata parameters.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill requires TDD (`Write tests FIRST` and run failing tests), but transcript shows implementation files were created before tests while handoff still marked `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md:28-34. Transcript skeleton entry (worker-transcripts.jsonl line 19) shows `sdk/src/types.ts`, `sdk/src/client.ts`, and `sdk/src/index.ts` created before `sdk/src/client.test.ts`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation assertions for backend SDK do not encode the feature requirement for dual ESM+CJS package output, so a stated requirement can regress while milestone assertions still pass.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature requirement includes "Ensure pnpm build produces ESM + CJS outputs" (mission features.json:625), but VAL-BACKEND-001..005 in validation-contract.md:147-170 only cover method behavior and typed responses.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature commit included unrelated frontend generated config changes, suggesting lack of explicit commit-scoping guidance for workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit c85c422 changed `web/next-env.d.ts` and `web/tsconfig.json` in addition to SDK files.

summary: Review result: fail. SDK feature implementation is substantial and tested, but it misses two blocking contract requirements (dual ESM+CJS output and getBalances API shape).
